examples: I am taking my son to Laos for sightseeing.
She moved with the same ease and loveliness I often saw in the women of Laos.
In Laos bargaining is done in soft voices and easy moves with the sort of quiet peacefulness.
The Vietnam War ended 40 years ago, but reminders are still everywhere in Laos.
The commercial center of southern Laos, Pakse, is busy, noisy and on a charm level with maybe Secaucus.
